CONTENT.Career: Valentini was released by 1. FC Nürnberg II on 29 May 2010 and signed for VfR Aalen.On 9 February 2014, he signed a three-year contract with Karlsruher SC to join them in July.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in Germany, Valentini is of Italian descent.
CONTENT.External links: Enrico Valentini at WorldFootball.netEnrico Valentini at SoccerwayEnrico Valentini at fussballdaten.de (in German)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played on 25 January 2021.

SUMMARY: Enrico Valentini (born 20 February 1989) is a German professional footballer who plays for 2. Bundesliga side 1. FC Nürnberg.
